positive: Minimalist geometric abstract pattern featuring stylized celestial elements: crescent moons, radiant stars, and ascending comet tails. Use a palette of deep navy blue, ethereal gold leaf, and soft matte cream. The composition should be repeating, interlocking pattern, suitable for seamless textile printing, maintaining negative space and strong symmetry. Style should be blend of Art Deco elegance and modern flat vector illustration. The texture must suggest a silkscreened or embossed print effect. Central focus: interlocking moon and star motif. Composition: Repeatable tile, perfect symmetry, central placement.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, signature, logo, watermark, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, messy, low detail
